```{r - propiedades Cu-phen en CP,echo=FALSE}
ggplot(data = propiedades_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `K(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle(' Rho vs K(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `L(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle(' Rho vs L(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `DelSqRho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle(' DistFromNuc vs DelSqRho CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle(' DistFromNuc vs Ven(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `V(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle(' DistFromNuc vs V(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `Ven/Vrep`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle(' DistFromNuc vs `Ven/Vrep` CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
#MAPA DE CALOR DE CORRELACION DE VARIABLES.
df4 <- propiedades_Cu_phen_CP %>% subset(select = c(`No`,`No_CP`,`clase`,`X`,`Y`,`Z`,`|GradDelSqRho|`,`estado_no`,`LaCP_type_no`,`DistFromNuc`,`Rho`,`DelSqRho`,`Ven(r)`,`Vrep(r)`,`Vnuc(r)`,`V(r)`,`G(r)`,`K(r)`,`L(r)`)) %>% na.omit()  
cor4 <- round(cor(df4),2) 
melt_cor4 <- melt(cor4)
ggplot(data = melt_cor4, aes(x=Var1, y=Var2,fill=value)) + geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "RdYlGn")) + geom_text(aes(Var2, Var1, label = value),color = "black", size = 1)

```

### promedio valores CP:

```{r - propiedades Cu-phen en CP PROMEDIO,echo=FALSE}

#Filtro para separar datos entre puntos (3,+3) y (3,+1)
propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1 <- propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP %>% filter(`LapCP Type` == '(3,+3)' )
propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2 <- propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP %>% filter(`LapCP Type` == '(3,+1)' )
#Graficas con puntos (3,+1)
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `No`,y = `DistFromNuc`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio distancia por clase CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `No`,y = `Vrep(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vrep por clase CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `No`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Ven por clase CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `No`,y = `G(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio G(r) por clase CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `L(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio distancia vs L(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `V(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio distancia vs V(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio distancia vs Ven(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `Vrep(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio distancia vs Vrep(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `L(r)`,y = `K(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio L(r) vs K(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `L(r)`,y = `G(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio L(r) vs G(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `L(r)`,y = `Rho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio L(r) vs Rho CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `K(r)`,y = `Vrep(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio K(r) vs Vrep(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `K(r)`,y = `Rho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio K(r) vs Rho CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `K(r)`,y = `Vnuc(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio K(r) vs Vnuc(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `V(r)`,y = `DelSqRho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio V(r) vs DelSqRho CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `V(r)`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio V(r) vs Ven(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Vnuc(r)`,y = `Rho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vnuc(r) vs Rho CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Vnuc(r)`,y = `Vrep(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vnuc(r) vs Vrep(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Vnuc(r)`,y = `K(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vnuc(r) vs K(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Vnuc(r)`,y = `L(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vnuc(r) vs L(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Vrep(r)`,y = `K(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vrep(r) vs K(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Vrep(r)`,y = `L(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vrep(r) vs L(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Ven(r)`,y = `DistFromNuc`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Ven(r) vs DistFromNuc CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Ven(r)`,y = `DelSqRho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Ven(r) vs DelSqRho CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Ven(r)`,y = `V(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Ven(r) vs V(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `DelSqRho`,y = `DistFromNuc`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DelSqRho vs DistFromNuc CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `DelSqRho`,y = `V(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DelSqRho vs Ven(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `DelSqRho`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DelSqRho vs V(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `Vrep(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Rho vs Vrep(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `Vnuc(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Rho vs Vnuc(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `G(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Rho vs G(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `K(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Rho vs K(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `L(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Rho vs L(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `DelSqRho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DistFromNuc vs DelSqRho CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DistFromNuc vs Ven(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP2,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `V(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DistFromNuc vs V(r) CP:(3,+1)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
#Grafica con puntos (3,+3)
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `No`,y = `DistFromNuc`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio distancia por clase CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `No`,y = `Vrep(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vrep por clase CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `No`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Ven por clase CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `No`,y = `G(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio G(r) por clase CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `L(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio distancia vs L(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `V(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio distancia vs V(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio distancia vs Ven(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `Vrep(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio distancia vs Vrep(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `L(r)`,y = `K(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio L(r) vs K(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `L(r)`,y = `G(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio L(r) vs G(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `L(r)`,y = `Rho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio L(r) vs Rho CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `K(r)`,y = `Vrep(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio K(r) vs Vrep(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `K(r)`,y = `Rho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio K(r) vs Rho CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `K(r)`,y = `Vnuc(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio K(r) vs Vnuc(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `V(r)`,y = `DelSqRho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio V(r) vs DelSqRho CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `V(r)`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio V(r) vs Ven(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Vnuc(r)`,y = `Rho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vnuc(r) vs Rho CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Vnuc(r)`,y = `Vrep(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vnuc(r) vs Vrep(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Vnuc(r)`,y = `K(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vnuc(r) vs K(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Vnuc(r)`,y = `L(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vnuc(r) vs L(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Vrep(r)`,y = `K(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vrep(r) vs K(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Vrep(r)`,y = `L(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Vrep(r) vs L(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Ven(r)`,y = `DistFromNuc`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Ven(r) vs DistFromNuc CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Ven(r)`,y = `DelSqRho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Ven(r) vs DelSqRho CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Ven(r)`,y = `V(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Ven(r) vs V(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DelSqRho`,y = `DistFromNuc`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DelSqRho vs DistFromNuc CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DelSqRho`,y = `V(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DelSqRho vs Ven(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DelSqRho`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DelSqRho vs V(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `Vrep(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Rho vs Vrep(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `Vnuc(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Rho vs Vnuc(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `G(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Rho vs G(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `K(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Rho vs K(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `Rho`,y = `L(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio Rho vs L(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `DelSqRho`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DistFromNuc vs DelSqRho CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `Ven(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DistFromNuc vs Ven(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
ggplot(data = propiedades_prom_Cu_phen_CP1,mapping = aes(x = `DistFromNuc`,y = `V(r)`,colour = `clase`)) + geom_line() + geom_point() + ggtitle('promedio DistFromNuc vs V(r) CP:(3,+3)') + scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("red","blue","green","yellow","purple","pink","orange","lightgreen","gray","navy"))
#MAPA DE CALOR DE CORRELACION DE VARIABLES.
df5 <- propiedades_Cu_phen_CP %>% subset(select = c(`No`,`clase`,`estado_no`,`LaCP_type_no`,`DistFromNuc`,`Rho`,`DelSqRho`,`Ven(r)`,`Vrep(r)`,`Vnuc(r)`,`V(r)`,`G(r)`,`K(r)`,`L(r)`)) %>% na.omit()  
cor5 <- round(cor(df5),2) 
melt_cor5 <- melt(cor5)
ggplot(data = melt_cor5, aes(x=Var1, y=Var2,fill=value)) + geom_tile() + scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "RdYlGn")) + geom_text(aes(Var2, Var1, label = value),color = "black", size = 1)

```


# MATRICES DE PESO

## GEOMETRIAS
### CP Vrep
```{r - determinantes matriz de adyacencia CP Vrep,echo=FALSE}
lista_det_CP_Vrep <- sapply(lista_matrices_CP_Vrep, det)
print(lista_det_CP_Vrep)
```

### CP Ven:
```{r - determinantes matriz de adyacencia CP Ven,echo=FALSE}
lista_det_CP_Ven <- sapply(lista_matrices_CP_Ven, det)
print(lista_det_CP_Ven)
```

### T Vrep:
```{r - determinantes matriz de adyacencia T Vrep,echo=FALSE}
lista_det_T_Vrep <- sapply(lista_matrices_T_Vrep, det)
print(lista_det_T_Vrep)
```


### T Ven:
```{r - determinantes matriz de adyacencia T Ven,echo=FALSE}
lista_det_T_Ven <- sapply(lista_matrices_T_Ven, det)
print(lista_det_T_Ven)
```


## Cu-phen
```{r - determinante matriz conectivdad Cu-phen,echo=FALSE}
lista_det_Cu_phen <- sapply(lista_matrices_Cu_phen, det)
print(lista_det_Cu_phen)

```

## Matrices de peso Cu-phen
```{r - determinante matriz peso Cu-phen,echo=FALSE}
lista_det_Cu_phen_r <- sapply(lista_matriz_Cu_phen_r, det)
lista_det_Cu_phen_Rho <- sapply(lista_matriz_Cu_phen_Rho, det)
lista_det_Cu_phen_DelSqRho <- sapply(lista_matriz_Cu_phen_DelSqRho, det)
lista_det_Cu_phen_Ven <- sapply(lista_matriz_Cu_phen_Ven, det)
lista_det_Cu_phen_Vrep <- sapply(lista_matriz_Cu_phen_Vrep, det)
lista_det_Cu_phen_Vnuc <- sapply(lista_matriz_Cu_phen_Vnuc, det)
lista_det_Cu_phen_V <- sapply(lista_matriz_Cu_phen_V, det)
lista_det_Cu_phen_G <- sapply(lista_matriz_Cu_phen_G, det)
lista_det_Cu_phen_K <- sapply(lista_matriz_Cu_phen_K, det)
lista_det_Cu_phen_L <- sapply(lista_matriz_Cu_phen_L, det)
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_r)
print("")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_Rho)
print("")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_DelSqRho)
print("")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_Ven)
print("")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_Vrep)
print("")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_Vnuc)
print("")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_V)
print("")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_G)
print("")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_K)
print("")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_L)

```
## Propiedades graficas

```{r - propiedades graficas Cu_phen,echo=FALSE}
grado <- function(grafica){max(degree(grafica))}
es_bipartita  <- function(grafica){bipartite_mapping(grafica)$res}
numero_automorfismo  <- function(grafica){count_automorphisms(grafica)$group_size}
lista_grado_Cu_phen <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen,grado)
lista_laplaciana_Cu_phen <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen, laplacian_matrix)
lista_det_laplaciana_Cu_phen <- sapply(lista_laplaciana_Cu_phen,det)
lista_coefficiente_racimo <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen,transitivity)
lista_triangulos <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen, count_triangles)
lista_spectro <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen, spectrum)
lista_diametro <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen, diameter)
lista_radio <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen, radius)
lista_excentricidad <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen, eccentricity)
lista_bipartita <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen, es_bipartita)
lista_automorfismo <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen,numero_automorfismo)
lista_euleriano <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen,has_eulerian_cycle)
lista_coloracion_Cu_phen <- sapply(lista_graficas_Cu_phen, num_color)
#imprimiendo lista
print("Grado maximo graficas")
print(lista_grado_Cu_phen)
print("determinante matriz laplaciana de graficas")
print(lista_det_laplaciana_Cu_phen)
print("determinante graficas de conectividad")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen)
print("Determinante de graficas atomicas con propiedad DistFromNuc")
print(lista_det_Cu_phen_r)
print("Coefficiente de Racimo/Cluster coefficient de la grafica")
print(lista_coefficiente_racimo)
print("Conteo de triangulos en graficas")
print(lista_triangulos)
print("Spectro de grafica (Valores Propios & Vectores propios)")
print(lista_spectro)
print("Diametro de grafica")
print(lista_diametro)
print("Excentricidad de grafica")
print(lista_excentricidad)
print("Es bipartita la grafica")
print(lista_bipartita)
print("Numero de automorfismo de la grafica")
print(lista_automorfismo)
print("Tiene ciclo euleriano")
print(lista_euleriano)
print("Lista Colores Cu-phen")
print(lista_coloracion_Cu_phen)
#imprimiendo lista

```
# Data Analisis

```{r - analisis de datos,echo=FALSE}

data <- read_excel('C:\\Users\\Hector Ramirez\\Documents\\codigo_python\\investigacion_graficas_atomicas\\datos\\datos.xlsx',sheet=1) #df con todos los datos.
data <- data %>% na.omit()

#agregar promedio por clase.



```



# Data Visualization

```{r - graficos_tesis,echo=FALSE}
# Grafica diagrama de pie de distribucion de clase de grafica.
df <- data.frame(clase = c(1:14),count = c(17,21,7,5,5,1,1,1,2,8,3,3,1,1),stringsAsFactors = FALSE)


ggpie3D(data = df, group_key = "clase", count_type = "count", tilt_degrees = -10, 
        start_degrees = 180, label_size=2) + 
  ggtitle("Distribucion de las graficas atomicas") + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
# Grafica Estado de oxidacion vs Clase de grafica por geometria.
df_clase <- data.frame(
  estado_oxidacion = c("Co2","Cr2","Cr3","Cu2","Fe2","Fe3","Mn2","Mn3","Mn4","Ni2","Ni3","Sc2","Sc3","Ti2","Ti3","V2","V3","V4","Zn2"),
  Octaedro= c(1,5,1,5,3,2,2,3,1,1,2,1,2,2,1,1,2,1,2),
  Cuadrado_plano = c(1,2,1,5,1,5,6,2,1,5,1,4,4,4,2,1,2,2,5),
  Tetraedro = c(2,2,2,7,1,4,4,2,2,1,1,3,9,9,8,2,2,3,9),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
pivot_df <-
  df_clase %>% 
  pivot_longer(!estado_oxidacion)


ggplot(pivot_df,aes(x=estado_oxidacion,y=value,group=name,color=name)) + 
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("red", "blue","green")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(1:14)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point() +
  ggtitle("Estado de Oxidacion vs Clase de grafica") +
  xlab("Estado de Oxidacion del Metal de Transicion") + ylab("Clase de Grafica")

# Grafica de Estado excitado del cobre vs Clase de grafica 
df_clase_Cu_phen <- data.frame(
  estado_excitado = c("s0","s1","s2","s3","s4","s5","s6","s7","s8","s9","s10","s11","s12","s13","s14","s15","s16","s17","s18","s19","s20"),
  clase = c(9,3,3,5,10,10,10,11,11,10,12,12,10,10,10,10,11,9,14,3,12),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

ggplot(df_clase_Cu_phen,aes(x=factor(estado_excitado,c("s0","s1","s2","s3","s4","s5","s6","s7","s8","s9","s10","s11","s12","s13","s14","s15","s16","s17","s18","s19","s20")),y=clase,group=1)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(1:14)) +
  geom_line(colour="orange") + 
  geom_point() +
  ggtitle("Estado excitado del cobre vs Clase de grafica") +
  xlab("Estado excitado del cobre") + ylab("Clase de Grafica")

```



```{r - visualizacion,echo=FALSE}

datos <- df_CP %>% filter(`Atom` == c('s0','s20','s10'))
viz_ven <- ggplot(datos, aes(x=`Atom`, y=`Ven(r)`,fill=`Atom`)) + 
  geom_boxplot() +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "point", shape = 8,size = 2, color = "white") +
  ggtitle('Distribucion de potencial atractivo por clase')

viz_vrep <- ggplot(datos, aes(x=`Atom`, y=`Vrep(r)`,fill=`Atom`)) + 
  geom_boxplot() +
  stat_summary(fun = "mean", geom = "point", shape = 8,size = 2, color = "white") +
  ggtitle('Distribucion de potencial repulsivo por clase')

print(viz_ven)
print(viz_vrep)

```
